name: Pea Shoots
description_chef: Classic shoots grown in organic soil for maximum sweetness and substantial texture.
description_chef_de: Klassische Sprossen aus Bio-Erde für maximale Süße und substanzielle Textur.

name: Pea Salad
description_chef: Grown longer than shoots for developed true leaves. Distinct pea flavor.
description_chef_de: Länger als Sprossen gewachsen für entwickelte echte Blätter. Deutlicher Erbsengeschmack.

name: Sunflower
description_chef: Thick, substantial stems with raw sunflower seed flavor. Amazing crunch.
description_chef_de: Dicke, substanzielle Stiele mit rohem Sonnenblumenkern-Geschmack. Erstaunlicher Biss.

name: Popcorn (Corn)
description_chef: Grown in the dark (blanched) for bright yellow color and shocking sweetness.

name: Wheatgrass
description_chef: Classic extraction grass. Dense nutrient profile for health shots.
description_chef_de: Klassisches Extraktionsgras. Dichtes Nährstoffprofil für Gesundheits-Shots.

name: Amaranth
description_chef: Neon fuchsia red color. The most vibrant visual garnish available.
description_chef_de: Neon-fuchsia-rote Farbe. Die lebendigste visuelle Garnierung verfügbar.

name: Red Beet Bull
description_chef: Deep red stems and leaves. Bulls Blood variety.
description_chef_de: Tiefrote Stiele und Blätter. Bulls Blood Sorte.

name: Radish Daikon
description_chef: Classic clean heat. White stems and green leaves.
description_chef_de: Klassische klare Schärfe. Weiße Stiele und grüne Blätter.

name: Radish Red Rambo
description_chef: Stunning deep purple leaves and stems. Adds drama and moderate heat.
description_chef_de: Atemberaubend tiefviolette Blätter und Stiele. Fügt Dramatik und moderate Schärfe hinzu.

name: Redish Mix
description_chef: A curated mix of our radish varieties for maximum color and spice variability.

name: Broccoli
description_chef: Mild brassica flavor. High in sulforaphane nutrient.
description_chef_de: Milder Kohlgeschmack. Reich an Sulforaphan-Nährstoff.

name: Red Cabbage
description_chef: The standard for purple garnishes. Mild flavor, pink/purple stems.
description_chef_de: Der Standard für lila Garnierungen. Milder Geschmack, pink/lila Stiele.

name: Red Kohlrabi
description_chef: Beautiful purple stems with green leaves.
description_chef_de: Wunderschöne lila Stiele mit grünen Blättern.

name: Mustard White
description_chef: Tastes distinctly like mustard/horseradish. Great cut through for rich meats.
description_chef_de: Schmeckt deutlich nach Senf/Meerrettich. Perfekt als Schnitt für reichhaltiges Fleisch.

name: Kale Black / Russian
description_chef: Frilly leaves. Less fibrous than mature kale.

name: Pak Choi
description_chef: Crisp stems and soft leaves. Gentle flavor.
description_chef_de: Knackige Stiele und weiche Blätter. Sanfter Geschmack.

name: Yellow Beet
description_chef: Stunning yellow/orange stem contrast. Milder than red beet.
description_chef_de: Atemberaubender gelb/oranger Stielkontrast. Milder als rote Beete.

name: Nasturtium Alaska
description_chef: Unique lily pad leaf shape. Intense pepper/wasabi flavor.
description_chef_de: Einzigartige Seerosenblattform. Intensiver Pfeffer/Wasabi-Geschmack.

name: Coriander
description_chef: Seed husk often attached (Split Coriander) for an extra burst of citrus flavor.
description_chef_de: Samenhülse oft angeheftet (Split Koriander) für einen extra Zitrus-Geschmacksstoß.

name: Rocket / Rucola
description_chef: Wild rocket variety with lobed leaves and distinct bite.

name: Dill
description_chef: Delicate feathery fronds. Classic pairing for fish.
description_chef_de: Zarte federige Wedel. Klassische Kombination für Fisch.

name: Leek
description_chef: Looks like grass with black seed tip. Intense onion profile.
description_chef_de: Sieht aus wie Gras mit schwarzer Samenspitze. Intensives Zwiebelprofil.

name: Garlic
description_chef: Garlic chives. Flat leaves with full garlic flavor.
description_chef_de: Knoblauch-Schnittlauch (Nira). Flache Blätter mit vollem Knoblauchgeschmack.

name: Fennel
description_chef: Bronze or green delicate fronds. Sweet anise notes.
description_chef_de: Bronze oder grüne zarte Wedel. Süße Anisnoten.

name: Parsley
description_chef: Petite Italian flat-leaf parsley.
description_chef_de: Zierliche italienische glattblättrige Petersilie.
